scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:ui
scripts.setup:ui: bash -lc 'cd ui && if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm install; else npm install; fi'
scripts.dev: bash -lc 'npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:ui & wait'
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev:ui: bash -lc 'cd ui && if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm dev; else npm run dev; fi'
